caption: Ang Mo Kio residential estate viewed from above, with HDB blocks arranged around a central shopping and community complex. An expressway runs along the right edge of the frame. Despite the industrial area filename, the scene is dominated by residential HDB blocks with orange-roofed older slab designs. A sports court with an orange surface is visible on the left, and the central commercial area features a blue-roofed building.

analysis.notable: Mature Ang Mo Kio HDB estate with blocks surrounding a neighbourhood commercial centre, adjacent to a major expressway providing connectivity to the rest of Singapore.
